title: Add network-derived location producer
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.5 adds a dedicated network app-interface producer API that submits NETWORK samples to the unified HAL provider, but no concrete network-derived location ingestion path currently feeds it. What needs to be done: define the network-derived location source surface, map mesh/peer-derived metadata into lichen_app_interface_submit_network_location() or lichen_hal_location_submit(), preserve source_name/source_class/status metadata, and add native_sim/qemu tests proving network fallback when manual/static or local-client sources are stale or absent.
notes:
2026-07-02 implementation evidence:
- Added gateway_network_location_submit() producer boundary in lichen/apps/gateway/src/network_location.c/.h and included it in gateway/test CMake.
- The helper validates required lat/lon, maps source_class=NETWORK, preserves optional altitude/fix_time/sats/age/horizontal+vertical accuracy/source_name metadata, defaults source_name through the app-interface bridge when source_name_valid=false, and submits via lichen_app_interface_submit_network_location().
- Added meshtastic_gateway_adapter ztests for NETWORK snapshot selection, default source_name + 2D/no-altitude, full source-name buffer termination, fresh local-client override, stale local-client/manual fallback to network, and invalid/null/partial/out-of-range samples preserving the prior valid snapshot.
- Scope note for review P2: this Bead intentionally establishes the software-only producer boundary. No production announce/peer caller exists yet because the C announce/gradient coordinate table and privacy semantics are not defined. Chained follow-ups: project-LICHEN-zte2.9.1 for announce-derived ingestion and project-LICHEN-zte2.9.2 for peer-reported privacy/provenance semantics.
- User epoch note captured in project-LICHEN-zte2.7.1: build-time or board/provisioned timestamp can be considered as a GNSS/Position epoch floor.

Review evidence:
- Faraday initial review: P2 source_name validity contract and P2 no production caller. Fixed source_name_valid API/tests; production caller risk recorded above with zte2.9.1 follow-up.
- Mendel initial review: no findings; requested source default/2D/invalid longitude tests and Twister evidence. Added tests and ran Twister.
- Kant initial review: no findings.
- Faraday follow-up: source_name P2 resolved; production caller still requires Beads evidence/follow-up, recorded here.
- Mendel follow-up: no P0/P1/P2 findings; Twister evidence required, recorded below.
- Kant follow-up: no P0/P1/P2 findings.
